title: Monolithic Power Systems (MPWR) vs. TXN and ADI: Are Investors Paying Too Much for AI Power Growth?
excerpt: Is MPWR a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. on Contrarian Indicator’s Substack by Cameron Fen. In this art...
content_html:
Is MPWR a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. on Contrarian Indicator's Substack by Cameron Fen. In this article, we will summarize the bulls' thesis on MPWR. Monolithic Power Systems, Inc.'s share was trading at $ 1,328.80 as of July 20th. MPWR's trailing and forward P/E were 93.92 and 54.05 respectively according to Yahoo Finance.

Photo by Yogesh Phuyal on Unsplash

Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. provides semiconductor-based power electronics solutions. Its fastest-growing customer base right now is AI data centers, and that's central to understanding the stock. AI servers use far more power than regular servers, and that power has to be delivered in more precise, complex ways than before, which is exactly what MPWR specializes in. First quarter 2026 revenue rose 26.1% year over year to a record $804.2 million, while adjusted EPS increased 26.2% to $5.10 — solid, but not spectacular for a stock trading at about 54 times next year's earnings, versus roughly 26 times for Analog Devices (NASDAQ:ADI) and 38 times for Texas Instruments (NASDAQ:TXN). The gap suggests that investors aren't paying for this year's growth, they're betting on several more years of it.

Read More: 15 AI Stocks That Are Quietly Making Investors Rich

Read More: Undervalued AI Stock Poised For Massive Gains: 10000% Upside Potential

The bullish case rests on AI infrastructure play with the idea that AI servers are only going to need more power management over time, not less. Each new generation of AI chips draws more electricity and needs more sophisticated circuitry to deliver it cleanly, so MPWR can grow two ways at once — more AI servers get built industry-wide, and each server needs more MPWR components than the last generation did. The evidence so far backs this up: MPWR's "Enterprise Data" segment, its AI server business, grew 97.7% year-over-year and now drives nearly 80% of the company's total revenue growth.

Management just raised its stated manufacturing capacity target from 4 billion to 6 billion units, essentially signaling that it expects demand large enough to need that much capacity. If cloud companies keep building bigger AI clusters and replacing older servers, bulls see multiple years of runway ahead, not just one good quarter. If that plays out, MPWR's earnings a few years from now should be much higher than today's— which is why investors are willing to pay 54 times next year's earnings. In addition to this, the recent dismissal of the Bel Power Solutions lawsuit eliminates a key legal overhang, which reinforces the broader investment case.

sentences.en: In addition to this, the recent dismissal of the Bel Power Solutions lawsuit eliminates a key legal overhang, which reinforces the broader investment case.

content_html_zh:
MPWR 是值得买入的好股票吗？ 我们在 Cameron Fen 的 Contrarian Indicator's Substack 上看到了一篇关于 Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. 的看涨论文。 在这篇文章中，我们将总结多头关于 MPWR 的论点。 截至 7 月 20 日，Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. 的股价为 1,328.80 美元。 根据雅虎财经的数据，MPWR 的追踪和远期市盈率分别为 93.92 和 54.05。

照片由 Yogesh Phuyal 在 Unsplash 上拍摄

Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. 提供基于半导体的电力电子解决方案。 目前其增长最快的客户群是人工智能数据中心，这是了解该股票的核心。 人工智能服务器比普通服务器使用更多的电力，并且必须以比以前更精确、更复杂的方式提供电力，这正是 MPWR 的专长。 2026 年第一季度收入同比增长 26.1%，达到创纪录的 8.042 亿美元，调整后每股收益增长 26.2%，达到 5.10 美元——虽然稳健，但对于明年市盈率约为 54 倍的股票来说并不引人注目，而 Analog Devices (NASDAQ:ADI) 约为 26 倍，Texas Instruments (NASDAQ:TXN) 约为 38 倍。 这一差距表明投资者并没有为今年的增长买单，而是押注于未来几年的增长。

阅读更多：15只让投资者悄然致富的人工智能股票

阅读更多：被低估的人工智能股票有望大幅上涨：10000% 的上涨潜力

看涨的理由取决于人工智能基础设施的作用，即随着时间的推移，人工智能服务器只会需要更多的电源管理，而不是更少。 每一代新一代的人工智能芯片都会消耗更多的电力，并且需要更复杂的电路来干净地提供电力，因此 MPWR 可以同时以两种方式增长——全行业构建更多的人工智能服务器，并且每台服务器比上一代需要更多的 MPWR 组件。 迄今为止的证据支持了这一点：MPWR 的“企业数据”部门（其人工智能服务器业务）同比增长 97.7%，目前带动了公司总收入增长的近 80%。

管理层刚刚将其既定制造产能目标从 40 亿件提高到 60 亿件，这实质上表明其预计需求量足以需要如此多的产能。 如果云公司继续构建更大的人工智能集群并更换旧服务器，看多者将看到未来数年的发展前景，而不仅仅是一个好的季度。 如果这种情况发生，MPWR 几年后的收益应该会比现在高得多，这就是为什么投资者愿意支付明年收益 54 倍的价格。 除此之外，最近驳回 Bel Power Solutions 诉讼消除了一个关键的法律悬而未决的问题，从而强化了更广泛的投资案例。
